name: Dual Identity
description: Distinguishes human authority owners from delegated agent principals and records trigger provenance across sessions, tools, and subagents.

auditDir.label: Audit Directory
auditDir.help: Optional directory for dual-identity JSONL audit logs. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/plugins/dual-identity.

injectSystemContext.label: Inject System Context
injectSystemContext.help: Prepend a dual-identity security context to each delegated run.

trackSubagents.label: Track Subagents
trackSubagents.help: Propagate authority-owner lineage into subagent and handoff sessions.

includeToolDerivedEvents.label: Include Tool-Derived Events
includeToolDerivedEvents.help: Record tool-result observation and persistence events in the dual-identity audit log.

enforceStatefulChecks.label: Enforce Stateful Checks
enforceStatefulChecks.help: Block memory-derived outbound/mutation flows, unauthorized persistence cues, and cross-agent delegation that violate the current task contract.

defaultAuthorityOwnerId.label: Default Authority Owner ID
defaultAuthorityOwnerId.help: Optional fallback human authority-owner id for local or CLI sessions without inbound channel identity.

defaultAuthorityOwnerLabel.label: Default Authority Owner Label
defaultAuthorityOwnerLabel.help: Optional fallback human label for local or CLI sessions without inbound channel identity.
